name: Terror Mod
author: Terror Mod Team
description: A comprehensive difficulty-enhancing overhaul for Resident Evil Outbreak FILE #1 & FILE #2. Reworks enemy aggression, scenario pacing, and survivor resource economy.

changelog: Fixed a door in the Below Freezing Point scenario that was not correctly applying the reduced durability values for VH+, Expert, Pro, and Ultra Pro difficulties.
Fixed a door in the Decisions, Decisions scenario with the same durability misconfiguration across the same difficulty tiers.
Fixed a miscalculation causing a Licker in the Hellfire scenario to retain incorrect health values when its respawn flag was active.
Fixed a miscalculation causing a Licker in the Decisions, Decisions scenario to retain incorrect health values when its respawn flag was active.
Fixed an item incorrectly obstructing the view of a collectible file in the Below Freezing Point scenario.
Corrected inaccurate environment flavor text in the Hellfire scenario.
Corrected inaccurate environment flavor text in The Hive scenario.
Updated text content for several in-game documents across multiple scenarios.
G-Embryo initial lunge attack Bleed chance reduced from 10% to 0% in Below Freezing Point.
G-Embryo life drain attack Bleed chance reduced from 20% to 1% in Below Freezing Point.
Reduced Giant Moths in Below Freezing Point. Replacement enemies inserted into affected rooms.
SLPM file for PCSX2 Nightly updated to version 4.3.6.

archives.description: ELF executable and core game folders
